examples.title: Modus Ponens Implementation
examples.description: Algorithm to apply Modus Ponens rule
examples.explanation: Given p→q and p, we conclude q. The algorithm checks if the second premise matches the antecedent of the implication.

examples.title: Modus Tollens Implementation
examples.description: Algorithm to apply Modus Tollens rule
examples.explanation: Given p→q and ¬q, we conclude ¬p by denying the consequent.

examples.title: Hypothetical Syllogism Chain
examples.explanation: Chains multiple conditional statements to derive a direct relationship between first antecedent and last consequent.
